{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shera's Vessel
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] gestures with her [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] possesses a [[Vessel]] that the [[Regents]] promised to examine.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's Vessel]]'s appetite was sated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
